name: Leaving Well Enough Alone: Enterprise Application Integration's Impact on ROI
description: Aberdeen Executive White Paper arguing that integrated enterprise application suites deliver superior ROI vs. best-of-breed point solutions. Built on interviews with a dozen IT professionals (Credit Suisse First Boston, Beneficial Life, Carreckers, Indian Motorcycle, State of Michigan, etc.). Documents 40-70% of IT budget on integration, Nike's $400M SAP+Siebel+i2 failed integration, 18-24 mo integrated-suite vs 3-6 mo single point vs 16-20 mo four-point integration timelines, and 3-10x license fees for full integration. This is the VENDOR-NEUTRAL version; study 7 is the Oracle-sponsored rewrite of the same research.

creator.name: Aberdeen Group (Katherine Jones, Tom Dwyer, Peter S. Kastner)
